---
is-index: true
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< zhaw-title-block >}}
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="html"}
# Abstract {.unnumbered}

{{< include chapters/_abstract-body.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Inhaltsverzeichnis {.unnumbered .unlisted}

{{< table-of-contents >}}
:::
